panels.description: A producer produce 1 rps checking that the External Kafka listener is reachable Requires a synthetic canary producer exporting kafka_canary_producer_* metrics; adapt to your own canary tooling or remove this panel.
panels.title: Canary Producer Throughput

panels.description: A producer produce 1 rps checking that the External Kafka listener has no errors Requires a synthetic canary producer exporting kafka_canary_producer_* metrics; adapt to your own canary tooling or remove this panel.
panels.title: Canary Producer Errors

panels.description: Number of Brokers Online
panels.title: Brokers Online

panels.description: Number of active controllers in the cluster.
panels.title: Active Controllers

panels.description: Number of topics in cluster
panels.title: Topics

panels.description: Replicas that are online
panels.title: Unclean Leader Election

panels.description: Number of unhealthy kafka nodes in envoy proxy Only applicable if external access is exposed through an Envoy proxy in front of the brokers.
panels.title: Envoy Unhealthy Kafka

panels.description: Number of partitions that don?t have an active leader and are hence not writable or readable.
panels.title: Offline Partitions Count

panels.description: Number of partitions which are at their minimum in sync replica count (| ISR | == | min.insync.replicas |).
panels.title: Partitions at mininimum ISR

panels.description: Number of partitions which are under their minimum in sync replica count (| ISR | < | min.insync.replicas |).
panels.title: Partitions under mininimum ISR

panels.description: Only applicable if external access is exposed through an Envoy proxy in front of the brokers.
panels.title: Envoy Instances

panels.description: Number of Zookeeper peers
panels.title: ZK Quorum Size

panels.description: Number of Zookeeper leaders in the cluster. It should always be 1
panels.title: ZK Leaders

panels.description: This should be 0 or No Data. If > 0 then a zk pod is out of sync with the cluster.
panels.title: ZK digest mismatches

panels.description: Replicas that are online
panels.title: Online Replicas

panels.description: Total remaining capacity in Kafka
panels.title: Kafka Disk Capacity

panels.description: CruiseControl unfixable goals requires manual intervention to Kafka. Check CC to see what goal fails to be self-healed
panels.title: CC Unfixable Goals

panels.description: Total number of consumer groups in cluster
panels.title: Consumer Groups

panels.description: Total Incoming Byte Rate
panels.title: Total Incoming Byte Rate

panels.description: Replication IN + OUT across the entire cluster
panels.title: Total Cluster Replication Rate

panels.description: Total Outgoind Byte Rate
panels.title: Total Outgoing Byte Rate

panels.description: Total Produce Request Rate
panels.title: Total Fetch Request Rate

panels.description: Message Conversations performed by broker due to message protocol mismatch on client side.
panels.title: Message Conversion Rate

panels.description: Broker traffic excluding replication
panels.title: Byte Rate Per Second

panels.description: Produce Request Rate.
panels.title: Produce Request Rate

panels.description: Fetch Request Rate
panels.title: Fetch Request Rate

panels.description: In the positive Y, number of active connections, in the negative Y, number of overflowing connections. The later should be 0. Only applicable if external access is exposed through an Envoy proxy in front of the brokers.
panels.title: Envoy connections

panels.description: Shows the disk in cluster which are over-used - (size wise) compared to avg on that broker

targets.expr:
sum by(broker,persistentvolumeclaim) (label_replace ( (kubelet_volume_stats_available_bytes{namespace="$kubernetes_namespace",persistentvolumeclaim=~"$cluster_name.*"}), "broker", "$1", "persistentvolumeclaim", "$cluster_name-([0-9]+)-.+"))

  < on (broker) group_left()

  (
0.8 * avg by (broker)(sum by(broker,persistentvolumeclaim) (label_replace ( (kubelet_volume_stats_available_bytes{namespace="$kubernetes_namespace",persistentvolumeclaim=~"$cluster_name.*"}), "broker", "$1", "persistentvolumeclaim", "$cluster_name-([0-9]+)-.+")))

  )

panels.title: Unbalanced disks in kafka cluster

panels.description: Requires a custom Kafka authorizer plugin that exports JMX metrics under the kafka_authorizer_* names used here; adjust the metric prefix/labels to match your authorizer, or remove this panel if you use Kafka's default authorizer.
panels.title: Authorizer Token Validations

panels.title: Container Memory Usage

list.definition: query_result(sort_desc((sum_over_time( sum by(topic) (increase(kafka_server_brokertopicmetrics_bytesin_total{namespace="$kubernetes_namespace",kafka_cr="$cluster_name",topic=~".*",topic!=""}[90s])) [${__range_s}s:90s] ) )+(sum_over_time( sum by(topic) (increase(kafka_server_brokertopicmetrics_bytesout_total{namespace="$kubernetes_namespace",kafka_cr="$cluster_name",topic=~".*",topic!=""}[90s])) [${__range_s}s:90s] ) ) OR (sum_over_time( sum by(topic) (increase(kafka_server_brokertopicmetrics_bytesin_total{namespace="$kubernetes_namespace",kafka_cr="$cluster_name",topic=~".*",topic!=""}[90s])) [${__range_s}s:90s] )) OR (sum_over_time( sum by(topic) (increase(kafka_server_brokertopicmetrics_bytesout_total{namespace="$kubernetes_namespace",kafka_cr="$cluster_name",topic=~".*",topic!=""}[90s])) [${__range_s}s:90s] ) ) ))
list.label: Topic
list.name: kafka_topic

query.query: query_result(sort_desc((sum_over_time( sum by(topic) (increase(kafka_server_brokertopicmetrics_bytesin_total{namespace="$kubernetes_namespace",kafka_cr="$cluster_name",topic=~".*",topic!=""}[90s])) [${__range_s}s:90s] ) )+(sum_over_time( sum by(topic) (increase(kafka_server_brokertopicmetrics_bytesout_total{namespace="$kubernetes_namespace",kafka_cr="$cluster_name",topic=~".*",topic!=""}[90s])) [${__range_s}s:90s] ) ) OR (sum_over_time( sum by(topic) (increase(kafka_server_brokertopicmetrics_bytesin_total{namespace="$kubernetes_namespace",kafka_cr="$cluster_name",topic=~".*",topic!=""}[90s])) [${__range_s}s:90s] )) OR (sum_over_time( sum by(topic) (increase(kafka_server_brokertopicmetrics_bytesout_total{namespace="$kubernetes_namespace",kafka_cr="$cluster_name",topic=~".*",topic!=""}[90s])) [${__range_s}s:90s] ) ) ))
